welcome.title: Prepare for Ancient Greek exams with structured notes and lessons.
welcome.lead: The ultimate platform for Greek high school students. Step-by-step guidance, curated notes, and interactive practice to help you ace your exams.

info.title: Information
info.body: Here is what you need to know about the platform.
info.bullet1: Structured notes for each grade, made for exam preparation.
info.bullet2: Step-by-step lessons you can follow at your own pace.
info.bullet3: Clear layout so you can find topics quickly.
info.extra: All content is organized by grade and subject, so you can focus on what matters for your exams.

grades.title: Grades
grades.cardHint: Select a grade to view its lessons.
grades.emptyHint: Grades will appear here once they are added.

instructions.title: Instructions of Use
instructions.step1: Choose your grade from the list above.
instructions.step2: Open a subject and its course or notes.
instructions.step3: Read the lessons and follow the steps in each chapter.

more.title: More
more.bullet1: New material and topics are added over time.
more.bullet2: Extra resources and explanations when they are ready.

communication.title: Communication
communication.lead: Send a message if you have questions or need help.
communication.note: We will get back to you as soon as we can.

lesson.purchaseRequired: Purchase the course to view the PDF.
lesson.title: Lesson

about.title: About
about.body: About the educator and this platform.

grade.title: Grade
grade.noSubjectsYet: No subjects for this grade yet.

subject.title: Subject
subject.noCoursesYet: No courses in this subject yet.

admin.overviewBody: Manage grades, subjects, courses, lessons, and view purchases.
admin.uploadsBody: Upload PDFs to Supabase Storage and attach to lessons.
admin.gradesEmpty: No grades. Create them via API or admin CRUD.

footer.tagline: Structured notes and lessons for Ancient Greek exam preparation.
footer.contactText: Questions or feedback? We are here to help.

login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue to your courses.

register.title: Register
register.subtitle: Create a student account to get started.
register.success: Account created. You can now log in.
